# Pack Planner Pro

> Windows desktop software for UK dog walkers and pet care professionals. One-time purchase of GBP 79 during launch pricing. No subscription, no cloud requirement, no monthly fees. Built by Jennie Dayer-Swan of Jennie's Positive Paws, Essex, UK.

## Product

- [Dog Walking Software UK](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/dog-walking-software-uk): Core product page with features, pricing, UK dog walker use cases, and product proof.
- [Dog Walking Software With No Monthly Fee](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/dog-walking-software-no-monthly-fee): Cost comparison against subscription alternatives and the buy-once pricing model.
- [Dog Walking Software For Sole Traders](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/dog-walking-software-for-sole-traders): Use case page for solo operators and one-person dog walking businesses.
- [Dog Walking Scheduling Software](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/dog-walking-scheduling-software): Weekly planner, schedule planning, dog walking diary, and calendar export features.
- [Pet Care Software](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/pet-care-software): Broader pet care professional use cases across walking, training, pop-ins, grooming, and small teams.

## Blog

- [How To Start A Dog Walking Business UK](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/blog/how-to-start-a-dog-walking-business-uk): UK startup checklist for new dog walkers.
- [Dog Walking Pricing Guide UK](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/blog/dog-walking-pricing-guide-uk): Pricing considerations for UK dog walking businesses.
- [Tools For Dog Walkers UK](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/blog/tools-for-dog-walkers-uk): Practical software and admin tools for dog walkers.
- [How To Organise Your Dog Walking Schedule](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/blog/how-to-organise-your-dog-walking-schedule): Scheduling, diary, and weekly planning guidance.
- [Dog Walking Invoicing](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/blog/dog-walking-invoicing-how-to-invoice-clients-properly): Invoicing process and record keeping for dog walkers.
- [Moving From Spreadsheets To Proper Dog Walking Software](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/blog/moving-from-spreadsheets-to-proper-dog-walking-software): When spreadsheets stop being enough and dedicated software becomes useful.

## Company

- [Contact](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/contact): Support and sales enquiries.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.packplannerpro.co.uk/privacy): GDPR and privacy information.
